MvC2 Attack and Animation data

These many pages were created by Anotak based upon the knowledge and insight of many smart people (as covered in the credits at the bottom of this page). Anotak has since retired from the scene and thus let us take the old legendary site and update it here with various improvements. The data is pretty technical (it's being read directly from the game binaries) and is not completely understood, but we're making an effort here to have it be as readable and usable as possible. You can find the attack and animation data for every move in the game, as well as sprites and animated GIFs for those moves. Enjoy! -Preppy and friends

For those seeking further insight into what values might mean, here's a complete (huge) dump of all possible values for attack data. This is not easily readable. And here is a complete (huger) dump of all possible values for animation data.

Marvel vs Capcom 2 and associated characters were created by Marvel, Capcom, and Moto Kikaku.
Credits: (alphabetical order)
This page generated by code created by: Anotak, Insanius, Mountainmanjed, Preppy
With help, knowlege, and insight from: Dantarion, Eidrian, Joo, Labryz, Lord_Yoshi, Magnetro, Mike Z, Paxtez, Mike Z, Skitz, Stiltman, SupaBuu

Additional thanks/shoutouts: SF4 Remix team (Miriam Burgers), UMVC3 EX team (emc and tabs), The Cutting Room Floor, DTWID & BTSX team, SK, combovid.com, bootdreams & dc-tools
